title: An Undertale & Deltarune Mod
description: [W.I.P] - This mod will add multiple characters, attacks, weapons, structures, lore, and more from the Toby Fox games into Minecraft
body:
***[Very early in development]***    - Made in MCreator

I'll try to keep the quality bar high. 


**REQUIRES GECKOLIB**


*Updates*
______________________________

- 


UNDERTALE and DELTARUNE is by Toby Fox

For Forge 1.20.1
